errors.throttle: Too many attempts. Try againt in {{ value }} seconds.

validation.usernameRequirements: Username must be at least 5 characters long and not contain whitespaces.
validation.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters long, contain letters and numbers, not contain whitespaces, and not be too common.

homePage.title: Home
homePage.projectSummary: Free and open soure URL shortener built with Django REST Framework and React
homePage.sectionLinkManagementBody: Our platform provides a dedicated dashboard interface directly in your user profile, where you can easily organize, track, and manage all of your links.
homePage.sectionMultipleLanguagesBody: Currently, you can use the platform in English and Ukrainian translations, with plans to add more languages in the future.
homePage.sectionResponsiveDesignBody: Regardless of the device you use to access our services, the website will adapt perfectly to any screen size, providing a smooth and user-friendly experience.
homePage.sectionOpenSourceBody: QWShortLink is completely free to use, with no hidden costs or limitations. It is an open-source project, distributed under the MIT License.
homePage.sectionOpenSourceGitHub: The source code is available on our GitHub:
homePage.sectionDisclaimerBody: We distribute our project under the MIT License, which makes everyone able to freely modify the code and host their own instance of QWShortLink. However, we cannot provide any guarantees about the safety of such self-hosted instances.
homePage.sectionDisclaimerUrl: The only URL of the original QWShortLink is
